db:start: SOCKET_DIR="${DEVBOX_PROJECT_ROOT:-$PWD}/.devbox/postgres"; if ! pg_ctl -D .devbox/postgres/data status >/dev/null 2>&1; then pg_ctl -D .devbox/postgres/data -l .devbox/postgres/postgres.log -o "-h 127.0.0.1 -p 54329 -c unix_socket_directories='${SOCKET_DIR}'" start; fi
db:create: psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 54329 -U inventorymgr -d postgres -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'inventorymgr'" | grep -q 1 || createdb -h 127.0.0.1 -p 54329 -U inventorymgr inventorymgr

psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 54329 -U inventorymgr -d postgres -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'inventorymgr_test'" | grep -q 1 || createdb -h 127.0.0.1 -p 54329 -U inventorymgr inventorymgr_test
db:stop: if [ -d .devbox/postgres/data ]; then pg_ctl -D .devbox/postgres/data status >/dev/null 2>&1 && pg_ctl -D .devbox/postgres/data stop || true; fi
setup: (cd backend && uv run alembic upgrade head)
